meanings.definition: someone who is no longer alive
examples: I wonder what the dead person would have done

meanings.definition: move away from a place into another direction
examples: Go away before I start to cry

meanings.definition: be at variance with; be out of line with

examples: The family took off for Florida

meanings.definition: remove oneself from an association with or participation in
examples: She left her position with the Red Cross
He left the Senate after two terms
after 20 years with the same company, she pulled up stakes

meanings.definition: wander from a direct or straight course
